articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization

articles.takeaway: Operational optimization through advanced technologies is essential to meet rising air traffic demand while reducing environmental impact across airline, airport, and flight operations.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
